title: In the Lords | Zac Goldsmith
meta_description: Early Day MotionsEarly day motions (EDMs) are formal motions used mainly, for publicising the views of individual MPs, drawing attention to specific events or campaigns, and demonstrating the extent of parliamentary support for a particular cause or point of view. For details of Early Day Motions (EDMs) signed by Zac click here.
